reference: I went to the doctor yesterday with a small bumpy rash just above my belly button to the right. She thought it could be shingles, but noted that I also had a viral infection. She prescribed me antibiotics and shingles cream, not giving me shingles tablets as I only have five spots. I now have eight spots, with two having black dots in the middle of them. I want to go back to work tomorrow and wonder if that is alright to do, seeing as the doctor wasn't too sure whether I had shingles or not.
